creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 226471
Fix signals for trash shortcut view

- Add patch, which fixes signals when something is deleted (trash icon is not automatically updated in side pane) [1], [2]
- Replace 'emblem-mail' icon by one provided by sysutils/xfce4-settings
- Bump PORTREVISION

Note: This bug affects releases 4.16.x and 4.17.x

[1] https://gitlab.xfce.org/xfce/thunar/-/issues/584
[2] https://gitlab.xfce.org/xfce/thunar/-/issues/571
